# [精度比对结果输出样例](https://developer.huawei.com/consumer/cn/doc/harmonyos-guides/cannkit-example-of-the-precision-comparison)

收起自动换行深色代码主题复制
```
data_cmp mean is -1.41e-05 data_gd mean is -1.41e-05split_count:2359296.0; max_diff_hd:0.1;---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Loop ExpectOut RealOut FpDiff RateDiff---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------00000001 0.0395813 0.0395813 0.0000000 0.000000000000002 0.0160980 0.0160980 0.0000000 0.000000000000003 -0.0443420 -0.0443420 0.0000000 0.000000000000004 -0.0847778 -0.0847778 0.0000000 0.000000000000005 -0.0066605 -0.0066605 0.0000000 0.000000000000006 0.0880737 0.0880737 0.0000000 0.000000000000007 0.0848389 0.0848389 0.0000000 0.000000000000008 0.1083374 0.1083374 0.0000000 0.000000000000009 0.0838623 0.0838623 0.0000000 0.000000000000010 0.0887451 0.0887451 0.0000000 0.000000000000011 0.0572205 0.0572205 0.0000000 0.000000000000012 0.0741577 0.0741577 0.0000000 0.000000000000013 -0.0762329 -0.0762329 0.0000000 0.000000000000014 -0.0957642 -0.0957642 0.0000000 0.000000000000015 0.0102234 0.0102234 0.0000000 0.000000000000016 -0.0828857 -0.0828857 0.0000000 0.000000000000017 -0.1006470 -0.1006470 0.0000000 0.000000000000018 0.0156174 0.0156174 0.0000000 0.000000000000019 0.0326233 0.0326233 0.0000000 0.000000000000020 0.1054688 0.1054688 0.0000000 0.000000000000021 0.0056496 0.0056496 0.0000000 0.0000000... ... ... ... ...---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------DiffThd PctThd PctRlt Result---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------0.0050 99.50% 100.000000% PassSuccess Success Success Success Success
```
